description: The video displays the Masterworks platform interface featuring art assets by artists like Banksy and George Condo, while the narrator explains that the platform makes art investment accessible beyond just billionaires and the super rich. (objects: Banksy artwork card, George Condo artwork card, Albert Oehlen artwork card, website navigation bar, diligence process statistics; location: Masterworks
when_to_use: (draft) beats functioning as other — review the source span and author the roles
